title: Java Presales Consultant
description:
Overview

We are seeking a customer-facing Java Pre-Sales professional with a strong consulting background and experience supporting defence or highly regulated public sector organisations. This role sits at the intersection of technology, solutioning, and trust-based client engagement, supporting complex, mission-critical systems.

Key Responsibilities

Pre-Sales & Solutioning

  • Act as the technical authority during pre-sales engagements for Java-based solutions, supporting bids, RFPs, and tenders within defence and secure environments
  • Translate defence and public sector requirements into scalable, secure Java solution architectures
  • Design and articulate end-to-end technical solutions, including application architecture, integrations, middleware, and infrastructure considerations
  • Support effort estimation, solution costing, and delivery approach definition

Client & Stakeholder Engagement

  • Engage directly with senior customer stakeholders, including technical, operational, and security teams
  • Present solution designs, technical walkthroughs, and value propositions to non-technical and technical audiences
  • Build credibility with defence customers by demonstrating strong understanding of compliance, security, and operational constraints
  • Act as a trusted advisor throughout the sales lifecycle

Consulting & Delivery Alignment

  • Collaborate closely with delivery, engineering, and project teams to ensure proposed solutions are feasible and delivery-ready
  • Provide technical governance and quality assurance during transition from pre-sales to delivery
  • Support proof-of-concepts, demos, and technical validations where required

Security & Compliance Awareness

  • Incorporate security-by-design principles aligned with defence and government standards
  • Understand data sensitivity, access control, and system resilience requirements common to defence environments
  • Contribute to risk assessments and mitigation strategies during solution design

Required Experience & Skills

Core Requirements

  • Strong hands-on or architectural experience with Java and enterprise Java frameworks
  • Proven background in consulting or system integration environments
  • Demonstrated experience supporting pre-sales, bids, or large-scale proposals
  • Prior exposure to defence, government, or highly regulated public sector customers
  • Ability to structure complex technical problems and communicate solutions clearly

Technical Competencies

  • Java application architecture and design patterns
  • Microservices, APIs, and system integrations
  • Familiarity with cloud, hybrid, or on-prem architectures
  • Understanding of DevOps, CI/CD, and modern delivery practices

Soft Skills

  • Strong client-facing communication and presentation skills
  • Confident working with senior stakeholders in secure or formal environments
  • Consultative mindset with strong commercial awareness
  • Ability to balance technical depth with business context

postedCompany.description:
K2 PARTNERING SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD

K2 Partnering Solutions is a professional global recruitment and staffing company which delivers top-tier IT professionals within the niche markets of ERP/CRM/SOA/BI.
In South-East Asia, we are the only foreign based staffing firm that focuses exclusively on the Enterprise Application market. With a focus on both permanent and contract (freelancing) recruitment in Singapore and regionally, our clients include many prestigious international companies as well as several large domestic firms. Being one of most well known technology recruiting firms globally, our main technological verticals include SAP and Cloud Technologies with an unparalleled attention to candidate service and client satisfaction. 
We are confident to expand our services in Asia with our trade mark quality control system REQ® (Relationship-Expertise-Quality).


Being the Best by working with the Best


K2 has a huge interest in establishing good relationships with IT and Business consultants who are specialized in the SAP/Cloud areas for both permanent and contract (freelancing) opportunities. We deliver on our promises and are able to provide opportunities here in Japan as well as within our global network.
K2 Partnering Solutions was established in London at 1997, we have successfully grown to a 250 million USD turnover company, and expanded our organizations to Europe, USA, South America and Asia with 21 offices operating at the moment.
K2 is currently expanding rapidly in Asia Pacific region. We aim to provide the very best in service to our consultants as well as IT talent to our clients across the region.
postedCompany.name: K2 PARTNERING SOLUTIONS PTE. LTD.
